content.body:
- dashboard/index.html: local HTML dashboard with charts for all 8 metrics,
  filters by project/manager/period, sortable task table, drag-and-drop JSONL
- dashboard/serve.py: tiny local server (localhost:9191) with POST /collect
  endpoint so the Refresh button can re-collect and reload without CLI
- scripts/collect-metrics.sh: scans ~/Github/*/.claude/metrics/*.jsonl,
  injects project field, combines into dashboard/data.jsonl
- docs/migration/saintfy-migration-map.md: complete relational mapping
  between Saintfy-Copilot and copilot-core for onboarding Saintfy as a
  new copilot-core project (13 sections, 4-phase checklist, 7 warnings)
content.subject: feat: add metrics dashboard, collector script, and Saintfy migration map
